name: FormGym: Doing Paperwork with Agents

description: arXiv:2506.14079v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Completing paperwork is a challenging and time-consuming problem. Form filling is especially challenging in the pure-image domain without access to OCR, typeset PDF text, or a DOM. For computer agents, it requires multiple abilities, including multi-modal understanding, information retrieval, and tool-use. We present a novel form-filling bench...
author: Matthew Toles, Rattandeep Singh, Isaac Song, Zhou Yu
